title: LibraryAnalyticsVariableUsagesByAsset
description: Library analytics variable usage data broken down by variable.

variableKey.description: Unique, stable id of the variable.

collectionKey.description: Unique, stable id of the collection the variable belongs to.

collectionName.description: The name of the collection the variable belongs to.

usages.description: The number of usages of the variable within the organization.

teamsUsing.description: The number of teams using the variable within the organization.

filesUsing.description: The number of files using the variable within the organization.
